prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类最低位次约8173→9718→9412→9794→6019，2025年位次大幅前移约3775名，主要因选科要求统一为"物理+化学"后竞争格局变化；2025年基准约6 019名；2021-2025年物理类计划分别为185、189、189、190、199人，呈小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划182人，较2025年减少17人（约-8.5%），属小幅缩招 ，理论上使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第36名，近年排名稳定在33-38名区间，属于顶尖211层次；近年声誉评价中性偏正面，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第65，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显报考热度异常信号；无投档断档记录；第五 轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A+，光学工程、控制科学与工程、机械工程获评A-，兵器科学与技术为传统王牌；与招生专业中的化工与制药类、自动化类、机械类、电子信 息类等高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业持续高热推荐，对物理类考生吸引力强；福建省2026年高考总人数约26.79万，较2025 年增加约1.56万人，按历史比例估算物理类约20.38万人，竞争加剧，近年波动不大；南京理工大学位于江苏省南京市，属长 三角核心城市，地域吸引力强；在福建省物理类招生规模约180-200人，属于省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移后的高位基准、2026年小幅缩招（-8. 5%）带来的竞争缓解、福建省考生总数增加带来的竞争加剧，以及学校稳定的211层次和热门工科专业的持续吸引力，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年6019名基础上略有后移；预测最低位次约5760名，区间5260-6260名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8173 → 9718 → 9412 → 9794 → 6019. In 2025, the ranking significantly advanced by about 3775 places, mainly due to changes in the competition landscape after the subject requirement was unified to "Physics + Chemistry"; the 2025 baseline is approximately 6019. From 2021 to 2025, the Physics Category enrollment plans were 185, 189, 189, 190, and 199 respectively, showing a slight expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 182, a decrease of 17 (about -8.5%) compared to 2025, which is a slight contraction, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 36th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable range of 33-38 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities. Recent reputation evaluations are neutral to slightly positive, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 65, rated as "average," with moderate short video exposure and no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. No record of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+, Optical Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering were rated A-, and Armament Science and Technology is a traditional strong point. These correspond highly to the enrollment majors such as Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering, Automation, Mechanical Engineering, and Electronic Information.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, strongly attracting Physics Category applicants. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Fujian Province is approximately 267,900, an increase of about 15,600 compared to 2025. Based on historical proportions, Physics Category examinees are estimated at about 203,800, intensifying competition, with little fluctuation in recent years. Nanjing University of Science and Technology is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal. The enrollment scale in Fujian Province for Physics Category is about 180-200, making it a key province for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high baseline after the significant ranking advancement in 2025, the slight enrollment contraction (-8.5%) in 2026 easing competition, the increased competition due to the rise in Fujian examinee numbers, and the stable 211 level and sustained appeal of popular engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 6019. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5760, with a range of 5260-6260.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Electronic Information (including Electronic Science and Technology, Electronic Information Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Communication Engineering)

- Mechanical (including Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, Industrial Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (including Materials Science and Engineering, Materials Physics, Nanomaterials and Technology, Materials Forming and Control Engineering)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering (including Chemical Engineering and Technology, Pharmaceutical Engineering, Materials Chemistry, Polymer Materials and Engineering, Applied Chemistry)
- Big Data Management and Application
- Industrial Design
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5260-6260, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 5200), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 6200), it is advisable to use Tier 3 majors as safety options and fill in Tier 2 majors steadily.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回升后的基准、2026年大幅扩招（+58%） 带来的显著竞争缓解、以及历史类考生小幅增加，预计2026年历史类最低位次较2025年明显后移；预测最低位次约3867名，区间3367-4367名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2385 → 2505 → 2763 → 3270 → 2833, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend, reaching a peak of 3270 in 2024 before rebounding to 2833 in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 2833rd place; enrollment plans for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 22, 19, 21, 21, and 19 respectively, remaining stable in the 19-22 range; the 2026 plan is 30, an increase of 11 (approximately +58%) compared to 2025, representing a significant expansion that substantially alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 36th in the Soft Science ranking, with a stable level; neutral reputation evaluation, no major negative public opinion; average popularity on Douyin; no record of admission cut-off drops; Nanjing University of Science and Technology is known for engineering, and its History Category majors are mainly foreign languages, social work, public administration, Marxist theory, etc., which have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category-related majors (foreign languages, social work, etc.) have average social popularity, with no obvious warming signals; the estimated number of History Category examinees in Fujian Province in 2026 is approximately 64,000, an increase of about 3,700 compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition, with little fluctuation in recent years; Nanjing, as a central city in the eastern region, still holds certain regional appeal for History Category examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline after the ranking rebound in 2025, the significant competition relief from the large expansion in 2026 (+58%), and the slight increase in History Category examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will noticeably decline compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3867th place, with a range of 3367-4367th place.
